mapper.update: WITH deleted_user AS ( UPDATE users SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false RETURNING id ) UPDATE orders SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM deleted_user WHERE orders.user_id = deleted_user.id AND orders.is_deleted = false
